name: OMNACORTIL SOLUTION 60ML
description: A corticosteroid oral solution containing prednisolone, used to treat allergic conditions, inflammation, and support hormonal balance.
uses: Treatment of allergic conditions (asthma, skin allergies, psoriasis, lung conditions)
Hormonal support when body cannot produce natural steroids
dosage: Take this medicine as instructed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C and use within 3 months. Store in original packing to protect from light. Keep out of reach of children.

name: MEDROL 4MG 1*10TAB
description: A corticosteroid medicine containing methylprednisolone used to manage inflammation and immune-related conditions.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor. Swallow whole with water after meals at a fixed time.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature in a cool, dry place away from children and pets.

name: MEDROL 4MG TAB
description: A corticosteroid medicine containing methylprednisolone used to manage inflammation and immune-related conditions.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor. Swallow whole with water after meals at a fixed time.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature in a cool, dry place away from children and pets.

name: ROXID 150 TAB 1*30
description: An antibiotic medication containing roxithromycin used for treating various bacterial infections throughout the body.
dosage: Take exactly as directed by your doctor.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: ROZAVEL F 1*15
description: A combination medication containing rosuvastatin and fenofibrate used to treat high cholesterol and triglyceride levels.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor with meals; swallow with water.

name: SARIDON TAB
description: Saridon is a trusted remedy for headaches, providing quick relief with a triple-action formula.
dosage: 1 tablet every 4-6 hours with a minimum 4-hour gap; maximum 6 tablets per 24 hours.

name: SENSODYNE MINT GEL 1*70GM
description: World's No. 1 toothpaste for sensitivity, offering relief and cavity protection for sensitive teeth.
dosage: Brush twice daily for long-lasting sensitivity protection.

name: SILVEREX CREAM
description: Topical antimicrobial cream combining two active agents for treating burn wounds and infection management.

name: SILVEREX GEL 1*20GM
description: Topical antimicrobial cream combining two active agents for treating burn wounds and infection management.
